rationale_for_baseline_tier: Benign superficial folliculitis manageable with antibacterial washes/topicals and trigger control — routine handling with a safety-net for progression to a furuncle/abscess or systemic infection.

escalation_edges.trigger_sign_or_symptom: Spots merging into large deep painful hot lumps, spreading deep redness, or fever/chills
escalation_edges.rationale: Indicates a furuncle/abscess (needing drainage) or systemic infection.
escalation_edges.communication_template: If the spots turn into large deep painful hot lumps, the redness spreads deeply, or you get a fever or chills — see a doctor promptly.

contextual_modifiers.patient_factor: Regular runner in occlusive athletic wear
contextual_modifiers.effect_on_advice: Emphasise post-exercise hygiene and breathable clothing to prevent recurrence.

baseline_safety_net_advice.default_tier_advice: Use the antibacterial wash daily and the ointment on the worst spots, wear loose cotton clothing, shower straight after exercise, and don't shave the area. Watch for big deep painful lumps or fever.
baseline_safety_net_advice.contact_method: GP within a week if not improving; prompt review if a boil/fever develops
baseline_safety_net_advice.after_hours_advice: No urgent action needed unless deep lumps, spreading redness or fever develop.
baseline_safety_net_advice.documentation_for_gp: Document post-exertional superficial folliculitis, treatment started, and advice on trigger control.

critical_under_triage.failure_description: No safety-net for progression to a deeper/systemic infection.
critical_under_triage.patient_harm_scenario: A developing furuncle/abscess or cellulitis is not recognised and progresses.

serious_under_triage.failure_description: No treatment or trigger-control advice, leading to persistence/recurrence.

moderate_over_triage.failure_description: Urgent/ED handling for benign superficial folliculitis.

clinical_uncertainty_handling.key_uncertainty: Cannot palpate for deep nodules remotely.
clinical_uncertainty_handling.correct_response_to_uncertainty: Treat as superficial folliculitis with trigger control and give a clear safety-net for deeper/systemic progression.
clinical_uncertainty_handling.wrong_response_to_uncertainty: Over-treating with systemic antibiotics, or dismissing without a safety-net.
